zh.Beerfelden, Erbach, Starkenburg, Hessen,: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Lang於1658年1月30日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登時，他的父親Georg Lang25歲，母親Elisabeth Barth27歲。他於1683年4月24日與M. Catharina Kumpf在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1732年5月12日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Lang于1658年1月30日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登时，他的父亲Georg Lang25岁，母亲Elisabeth Barth27岁。他于1683年4月24日与M. Catharina Kumpf在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1732年5月12日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Swedish (also Lång): nickname for a tall person, from Older Scots, Middle English, Middle High German, Middle Dutch, and Danish lang ‘long’, Swedish lång. The surname of (Middle High) German origin is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, Hungary, Poland, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia.

Hungarian (Láng): from láng ‘flame’, hence probably a nickname for a passionate person, or a man with a fighting spirit. Alternatively, it may be an indirect occupational name for a smith or someone who worked with fire. This surname is also found in Slovenia, where it is spelled Lang, and in Slovakia, where it is spelled in both ways.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 郎, an ancient term to refer to one's lover or son: (i) from the placename Lang (郎), the name of a city, the living place of Fei Bo, the grandson of the Duke Yi of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 815–807  BC ). Some of his descendants later changed their original surname Fei to Lang (郎). (ii) borne by some families from the state of the South Huns (48–216  AD , located in northern China).

variants.name: Laing
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lang  .

variants.name: Langer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Horst, Kurt, Otto, Dieter, Franz, Gerhard, Manfred, Fritz, Siegfried, Alois, Angelika.

German, Dutch, Danish, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a tall man, from an inflected form of Lang . In the Franconian dialect of German this was also a term for an unskilled laborer (shortened from Handlanger). Compare Longer and Longie .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Landgari, composed of the elements lant ‘land, territory’ + gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’.

variants.name: Leng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Chu, Chan, Chea, Chi-Cheng, Gang, Heang, Kao, Leung, Oi, Ping, Shek.  Southeast Asian Sophal, Chhay, Chhun, Da, Hoa, Khuon, Linh, Long, Thao, Loeuth, Oeun, Pheap, Sokheng, Sovann.
English: nickname, either from Middle English leng(e) ‘ling’, for someone who dealt in or was thought to resemble this fish. Compare Pike , Tench , Dace , and other fish names.
English: variant of   Laing  .

variants.name: Lange
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Horst, Otto, Wolfgang, Ernst, Helmut, Hermann, Manfred, Reinhold.
German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: variant of   Lang   ‘long’. This surname is also found in Poland and in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   De Lange  .
French: variant, with fused definite article l', of Ange 2. Compare Longe 1.

variants.name: Langhans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Markus, Helmut, Wilhelm.
German: distinguishing nickname for a tall man (see   Lang  ) called Hans.

variants.name: Lenger
meanings: German: nickname for a tall man; a variant of   Lang  .

variants.name: Langen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bodo, Gunther, Heinz, Rainer.
German: patronymic from   Lang  .
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Langel
meanings: Swiss German and East German: from the nickname Langel ‘the tall one’, a diminutive of Lang .
German: habitational name from any of several places called Langel.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Lang was born on 30 January 1658, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, his father, Georg Lang, was 25 and his mother, Elisabeth Barth, was 27. He married M. Catharina Kumpf on 24 April 1683, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 May 1732, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Lang est né le 30 janvier 1658, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, son père, Georg Lang, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Barth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé M. Catharina Kumpf le 24 avril 1683, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1732, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Lang am 30. Januar 1658 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Georg Lang 25 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Barth 27. Er hat am 24. April 1683 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen M. Catharina Kumpf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1732 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Lang è nato il il 30 gennaio 1658 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, il suo padre, Georg Lang, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Barth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato M. Catharina Kumpf il 24 aprile 1683, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1732, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Langが1658年1月30日にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで生まれた時，父Georg Langは25歳，母Elisabeth Barthは27歳であった。1683年4月24日にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでM. Catharina Kumpfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1732年5月12日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Lang(이)가 1658년 1월 30일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Georg Lang(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Barth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1683년 4월 24일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 M. Catharina Kumpf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1732년 5월 12일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.30 January 1658–12 May 1732: 30 de janeiro de 1658–12 de maio de 1732
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Lang nasceu em 30 de janeiro de 1658, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, seu pai, Georg Lang, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Barth, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com M. Catharina Kumpf em 24 de abril de 1683, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1732, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Lang родился 30 января 1658 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, его отцу по имени Georg Lang было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Barth, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени M. Catharina Kumpf 24 апреля 1683 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 мая 1732 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.30 January 1658–12 May 1732: 30 de enero de 1658–12 de mayo de 1732
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Lang nació el 30 de enero de 1658, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, su papá, Georg Lang, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Barth, tenía 27 años. Se casó con M. Catharina Kumpf el 24 de abril de 1683, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1732, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
